text.title: ES Agentic Pipeline Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example of one full pipeline run for the Order aggregate + items projection.

example.title: Order aggregate pipeline run
example.code:
Aggregate: Order
Stage 1 (aggregate-design / sonnet): Events: OrderPlaced, ItemAdded, ItemRemoved, OrderShipped, OrderCancelled Commands: place(), add_item(sku, qty), remove_item(sku), ship(carrier), cancel() Invariants: cannot place empty order; cannot ship cancelled order; cannot modify shipped order ACCEPTED — all event names past-tense.
Stage 2 (event-class-codegen / sonnet): domain/order_events.py: @dataclass(frozen=True) per event with event_id + occurred_at + order_id domain/order.py: command methods validate + emit; _apply_OrderPlaced / _apply_ItemAdded etc. mutate state infra/repository.py: load(stream_id) -> Order; save(stream_id, events, expected_version) ACCEPTED — apply-only mutation + expected_version passed.
Stage 3 (projection-codegen / sonnet): projections/orders.py: handle_OrderPlaced -> UPSERT order_summary row; handle_ItemAdded -> UPDATE total ACCEPTED — no business logic, no side effects.
Stage 4 (tests-codegen / haiku): test_place_emits_OrderPlaced test_replay_from_events_matches_live_state test_save_with_stale_expected_version_raises_ConcurrencyError ACCEPTED — tests assert event emission, not getter equality.
Stage 5 (antipattern-review / sonnet): All 5 rules from 01-core-rules.xml verified. ACCEPTED — PR may merge.
example.note: Each stage's output is gated against the relevant rule before advancing.

example.title: Stage 2 rejection: CRUD events + mutate-in-command
example.code: Stage 2 output (FIRST ATTEMPT): - Event name "UpdateOrder" emitted. - Order.place() sets self.status = "placed" directly. REVIEW: REJECTED - rule past-tense-event-names: UpdateOrder is procedural, not past-tense. - rule apply-only-mutation: status set in command, not in _apply. Re-prompt with examples; re-generate.
